source_excerpt: "That Tardos Mors," he said, earnestly, "may meet the greatest living warrior of Barsoom is a priceless honor, but that he may lay his hand on the shoulder of a friend and ally is a far greater boon."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
